Our story

Example Bakery is a family-run sourdough bakery that opened in downtown Springfield in 1998.

It started with one oven and a single jar of starter. Today we still bake every loaf by hand, early each morning. The recipe has barely changed. We believe good bread needs time, simple grain and a little patience. That belief still guides every batch.

Milestones over the years

  • 1998: We opened with one small oven on Main Street.
  • 2004: We added croissants and seasonal fruit tarts.
  • 2012: We began taking custom cake orders for events.
  • 2020: We started same-day online pickup for regulars.

Our flour comes from mills in the region. We name the farms on our labels so you know the source. For background on the craft, see the entry on baking on Wikipedia.

We are proud to be part of this town. Stop by, say hello, and taste what a slow rise can do. There is always fresh bread on the shelf when the shop is open.

Back to the homepage

Example Bakery — 1 Main St, Springfield — +1-555-0100
